full_text:
Gan Xiu 干休
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gan Xiu (干休). Old man who warned Sun Xiu to “move faster, for things may change swiftly.” Gan Xiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
